overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Last of Us showing Joel exploring an abandoned neoclassical building. The character ascends a grand outdoor staircase, traverses interior corridors, and surveys a large domed rotunda before entering a dining hall. The environment features weathered marble, deteriorated murals, and post-apocalyptic decay with muted, earthy color grading.

events.description: companion character Ellie moves aside as Joel approaches the stairs

agents.ego_description: approaching the grand stone staircase in the courtyard

notable_agents.action: Ellie standing near the statue before stepping aside

entered.detail: large bronze sculpture of reclining figure on inscribed marble pedestal
wide weathered stone stairs with metal railings leading upward
tall marble wall with circular window and decorative molding
wrought iron handrail along the staircase

segments.scene_description: In an abandoned courtyard, Joel walks toward a grand stone staircase. A bronze memorial statue stands to the right on a marble pedestal, while weathered marble walls enclose the space. The companion character Ellie stands near the statue before moving aside.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with deteriorated historical mural

events.description: passing from shadow into light streaming through skylight above
approaching the large deteriorated mural at the stair landing

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper level landing

entered.detail: large faded wall painting depicting historical figures, heavily water-damaged and peeling
glass ceiling panels allowing diffused natural light to illuminate the stairs
fluted classical column supporting the upper structure
large arched wooden doors with glass panels and a bench in front

segments.scene_description: Joel ascends the grand staircase, passing from shadow into light from a skylight above. The walls show a large deteriorated mural depicting historical scenes. At the landing, wooden double doors sit beneath the damaged artwork, flanked by classical columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit corridor with empty picture frames

events.description: entering the dark interior corridor from the stairwell landing
approaching bright light at the end of the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the dim corridor toward the light at the far end

entered.detail: tall arched stone doorway leading deeper into the building
empty gilded picture frames hanging on the corridor walls
derelict wooden bench against the wall
illuminated exit at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Joel enters a dark, narrow corridor with empty picture frames on the walls and derelict benches. The space is dimly lit, with bright light visible at the far end. The marble floor is dirty and cracked, showing signs of long abandonment.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular great hall with domed ceiling and upper balconies

events.description: entering the grand rotunda from the narrow corridor
pausing to survey the lower level from the upper balcony

agents.ego_description: surveying the grand rotunda from the upper balcony before continuing along the walkway

entered.detail: ornate circular ceiling with skylight and hanging vegetation growing from cracks
upper level walkway with stone balustrade overlooking the main floor
tall arched doorways on the lower level letting in natural light
circular patterned marble floor of the main hall below
decorative stone railing along the balcony edge
arched entry leading to the adjacent dining hall

segments.scene_description: Joel emerges into a magnificent circular rotunda with a high domed ceiling and skylight. From the upper balcony, he surveys the grand space with its arched openings, ornate railings, and patterned marble floor below. Vegetation hangs from the ceiling, indicating years of decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned dining hall with scattered furniture

events.description: entering the dining hall through the archway from the rotunda

agents.ego_description: walking into the dining area with overturned tables and chairs

entered.detail: long wooden dining tables with scattered chairs, some overturned
row of tall arched windows with tattered curtains
ornate ceiling light fixture hanging above the dining area
long wooden sideboard against the wall with debris on top

segments.scene_description: Joel enters an abandoned dining hall with long wooden tables and scattered chairs. Tall arched windows with tattered curtains line the right wall, allowing diffused light to enter. A chandelier hangs from the ceiling above the debris-strewn marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a weathered outdoor courtyard into the decaying grandeur of a neoclassical interior. It begins with Joel walking past a bronze memorial statue toward a grand stone staircase, ascending from deep shadow into the bright light of a skylight beneath a deteriorated historical mural. As he passes through wooden double doors, the scene shifts into a dark, narrow corridor lined with empty picture frames and cracked marble floors before opening up into a magnificent circular rotunda. The camera then surveys the high domed ceiling and hanging vegetation from an upper balcony before finally moving forward into an abandoned dining hall filled with long wooden tables and diffused light filtering through tattered curtains.
